title: CI VMs: bump to new versions with tmpfs /tmp
body:
For the last long time, Fedora CI VMs have had a disk /tmp.
Real-world setups typically have tmpfs /tmp. This switches
to CI VMs that reflect the real world.

See https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/340

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Yay, passes with no changes anywhere! Podman is [more complicated](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/22207), please don't merge this one until/unless there is full consensus to go this route.
